figures.caption: Table 1: Overview of the nine-metric rubric evaluation protocol. Algorithmic metrics are scored on a continuous [0, 1] scale; LLM-judged metrics use a five-point Likert scale normalized to [0, 1] for aggregation.
Figure 3: Distribution of LLM-judged metric scores (1–5) for Qwen 3.5-9B at each training stage (Base, SFT, DPO). Average scores are reported in the legend.

Table 2: Performance of 13 LLMs on the FinTrace test set. Tool Calling F1, Step Efficiency, and Redundancy Score are reported on a [0, 1] scale; all other metrics are on a [1, 5] scale. The Overall score is the mean of all nine metrics after normalizing to [0, 1]. Bold indicates the best result per column; underline indicates the second best.
